phrase: 满月夜，借一点月光就够了
phrase_en: A full moon lends all the light you need
explanation: 月亮的亮度差可达三百倍，GloWalk 据此自动调整手电筒亮度
explanation_en: Moonlight varies three-hundredfold — GloWalk adapts your brightness to match

phrase: 路灯下有分寸，暗巷里不迟疑
phrase_en: Measured beneath streetlamps, fearless in the dark
explanation: 摄像头每 5 秒采样环境光，滞后逻辑防止灯光在临界值反复跳变
explanation_en: The camera samples ambient light every few seconds — no flickering at the threshold

phrase: 走过五分钟，眼睛已经适应了黑暗
phrase_en: After five minutes, your eyes have found the dark
explanation: 暗适应曲线让灯光随步行时长逐步调暗，不知不觉间省下电量
explanation_en: A subtle dimming curve follows your eyes' natural adaptation — saving power without notice

phrase: 下雨天的路面，光照上去是不一样的
phrase_en: Rain-slick streets catch the light differently
explanation: 雨后沥青反光率是干燥时的 2-3 倍——天气影响灯光策略
explanation_en: Wet asphalt reflects twice as much light — weather shapes the glow

phrase: 放进口袋的光，是浪费也是隐患
phrase_en: A lantern in your pocket serves no one
explanation: 每 5 秒检测一次遮挡，被遮挡时自动熄灯
explanation_en: The proximity sensor watches your pocket — the light rests when covered

phrase: 屏幕越亮，脚下越需要光
phrase_en: The brighter your screen, the darker the path beneath
explanation: 瞳孔收缩让你看不清暗处——屏幕亮度反向补偿手电筒亮度
explanation_en: Your pupils tighten for the screen — GloWalk brightens to compensate

phrase_en: Forty-two minutes. Not a battery reading — peace of mind
explanation: 基于当前亮度、步行速度和环境预判的实时剩余照明时间
explanation_en: A real-time estimate based on brightness, pace, and your surroundings

phrase: 走完这段夜路，让关心你的人知道
phrase_en: Finish your night walk — let someone know you're home
explanation: 到达后生成一张海报分享给朋友，一张图胜过一句'我到了'
explanation_en: A single poster says more than a thousand 'I'm home' texts
